scripts.dev: npm run dev:db && npm run dev:services
scripts.dev:services: concurrently -k -n frontend,gateway,auth,users,tickets,notify -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,red "npm run dev -w @helpdeskflow/frontend" "npm run dev -w @helpdeskflow/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w @helpdeskflow/auth-service" "npm run dev -w @helpdeskflow/user-service" "npm run dev -w @helpdeskflow/ticket-service" "npm run dev -w @helpdeskflow/notification-service"
